MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Todd B. Rothbard, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and the defendant appeared in pro per. The matter settled per written stipulation, not placed on record. Trial date is vacated.
